properties.name: name
properties.summary: The filename of the texture in the library (without extension).

properties.name: xSize
properties.summary: X size of the picture in model space, by default 1.

properties.name: ySize
properties.summary: Y size of the picture in model space, by default 1.

properties.name: FillRectangle
properties.summary: True, if fit the rectangle with the picture in a central position, using the natural aspect ratio of the picture.

properties.name: FitPicture
properties.summary: True, if fit the picture in the middle of the rectangle, using the natural aspect ratio of the picture.

properties.name: mirrorX
properties.summary: True, if the texture is mirrored in X direction.

properties.name: mirrorY
properties.summary: True, if the texture is mirrored in Y direction.

properties.name: useAlphaChannel
properties.summary: True, if the alpha channel of the texture is used.

properties.name: alphaChannelChangesTransparency
properties.summary: True, if the alpha channel of the texture changes the transparency.

properties.name: alphaChannelChangesSurfaceColor
properties.summary: True, if the alpha channel of the texture changes the surface color.

properties.name: alphaChannelChangesAmbientColor
properties.summary: True, if the alpha channel of the texture changes the ambient color.

properties.name: alphaChannelChangesSpecularColor
properties.summary: True, if the alpha channel of the texture changes the specular color.

properties.name: alphaChannelChangesDiffuseColor
properties.summary: True, if the alpha channel of the texture changes the diffuse color.
